productDisplayName: BIBA Women Solid Navy Blue Kurta
description: CompositionNavy Blue kurta made of two-tone 100% cotton, has a shirt collar, full front opening with buttoned placket, long sleeves with cuff-link style buttoned cuffs, diagonal pintucked panel on bodice with sequins, short vents at sides and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron A man's shirt has been reinvented as a kurta from biba – complete with button cuffs and curved hem, but with lovely feminine details. This kurta is made of two-tone blue and black cotton which give an eye-catching look to the fabric. Wear this over leggings or over jeans depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
